description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stone or stucco, and the property is surrounded by a well-maintained garden with several trees and shrubs. The house features large windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The driveway leads to a garage on one side, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch area. The landscaping includes a mix of paved walkways, green lawns, and decorative plants, creating a welcoming and upscale residential appearance. The house sits on a corner lot, bordered by two streets, enhancing its accessibility and curb appeal.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens on a corner lot. The light-colored exterior and geometric design give it a contemporary, upscale look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and lush landscaping with several trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, additional greenery, and the house's clean, rectangular lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a private garden area, patio, and more secluded outdoor spaces with trees.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side yard, patio, and a mix of greenery and paved areas, with the house's flat roof and modern design visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, flat overhang, and minimalistic door design, flanked by landscaping and a paved path.
